chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 1035 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection Nos. 15, 16 & 25. 2. For order on CMA No. 1831/23 (Ex) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For order on CMA No. 1832/23 (stay) 07.10.2025 Mr. Saleh Muhammad, advocate filed Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, superseding the earlier counsel, which is taken on record. On the last date of hearing the following order was passed:- “Learned counsel seeks time to frame proper questions of law arising out of the impugned judgment. Adjourned.” Today no reformulated questions have been placed on record and merely adjournment has been sought for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
